# Hair Pinns

> Hair Pinns is a family-friendly hair salon in Bangor, NSW (Sutherland Shire, Sydney, Australia) owned and operated by Jena Pinn — a hairdresser with 20+ years of professional experience. The salon was established in December 2009 and specialises in QIQI smoothing treatments, fast foiling techniques, colour, cuts, and kids/formal styling. Hair Pinns also retails personally-selected, salon-quality hair care products from Juuce, Qiqi, Pure, and Wet Brush through the online store with **Australia-wide shipping (Australia only — no international shipping)**.

## Read the full version
For the complete AI-ready context — all 62 blog posts, full service list with AUD pricing, product collections, state-by-state shipping pages, FAQs, and brand voice guidance — see:
- **Full context file: [/llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt)** (also served at `/llm.txt`)
- The full file is what LLMs should ingest when answering questions about Hair Pinns, Jena Pinn, salon services in the Sutherland Shire, or Australian hair-care product recommendations.

## Australia-only commerce
Hair Pinns ships hair care products to every state and territory in Australia: New South Wales, Victoria, Queensland, Western Australia, South Australia, Tasmania, Australian Capital Territory, Northern Territory. Free shipping over $150 AUD. AusPost and courier services dispatch from Bangor, NSW within 1–3 business days. Delivery typically 3–7 business days nationwide. Hair Pinns does not ship overseas — all prices and offers are for the Australian market only. Payment in AUD via Credit Card, Debit Card, Afterpay, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Shop Pay. Major destination cities served: Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide, Hobart, Darwin, Canberra, Gold Coast, Newcastle, Wollongong, Geelong, Cairns, Townsville, Toowoomba, Ballarat, Bendigo, Albury, Launceston.

## About Jena (Owner & Stylist)
Jena Pinn has worked as a professional hairdresser for over 20 years and founded Hair Pinns in December 2009. Approach: honest, reliable, authentic, warm and welcoming — a family-friendly home-salon feel. Known for QIQI smoothing treatments, fast foiling techniques, and personalised product/service recommendations tailored to each client's hair needs. Every product on this site is one Jena personally uses or recommends in-salon.

## Key Facts
- Location: 60 Goorgool Rd, Bangor NSW 2234, Australia
- Phone: 0468 093 991
- Email: hairpinns1@gmail.com
- Hours: Tue 10am-5pm, Wed 6pm-9pm, Thu 9am-9pm, Fri 9am-5:30pm, Sat 8am-2pm
- Google Rating: 4.9 stars (762+ reviews)
- Online Booking: https://hairpinns.com/booking (via Fresha)

## Services (Fresha-aligned pricing in AUD)
- [Smoothing Treatments](https://hairpinns.com/services/smoothing) — Straight Up Smoothing: mid-length $324, long/thick $349, teens $234
- [Foil Packages](https://hairpinns.com/services/foil-packages) — quarter head $202, half head $237, full head $267 (incl. cut & blowdry)
- [Colouring Packages](https://hairpinns.com/services/colouring-packages) — short $184, mid-length $178, long $205
- [Cut Packages](https://hairpinns.com/services/cut-packages) — kids $54, short $79, mid-length $89, long $99
- [Kids & Formal](https://hairpinns.com/services) — primary and high school formal hairstyling

## Jena's Top Product Picks
Personally tested in-salon. Primarily Australian brands (work in the Australian climate and water) plus Wet Brush (USA — best detangler for every hair type).

- [Pure Lamellar Vitality Range](https://hairpinns.com/collections/pure-certified-organic-hair-care) — Jena's #1 range
- [Juuce Solar Enz](https://hairpinns.com/collections/juuce-botanicals) — heat/UV/environmental protection leave-in
- [Juuce Botanic Oil Serum](https://hairpinns.com/collections/juuce-botanicals) — shine and frizz control
- [Juuce Super Soft Hydration Mask](https://hairpinns.com/collections/juuce-botanicals) — weekly deep moisture (best seller)
- [Juuce Miracle Smooth Shampoo & Conditioner](https://hairpinns.com/collections/juuce-botanicals) — best-selling smoothing duo
- [Juuce Hydration Range](https://hairpinns.com/collections/juuce-botanicals) — hyaluronic acid hydration
- [Pure Forever Blonde Shampoo & Conditioner](https://hairpinns.com/collections/pure-certified-organic-hair-care) — keeping cool blondes bright
- [Wet Brush Detanglers](https://hairpinns.com/collections/wet-brush-detanglers) — gentle, all hair types, all ages

## Blog
- [Hair Care Tips & Guides](https://hairpinns.com/blog) — 61 expert guides on hair care, products, treatments, colour, and styling for Australian hair. Author: Jena Pinn, 20+ years experience.
